expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude identified UNI on Ethereum from training knowledge and assumed Ethereum without asking. Did not ask the user to specify chain.

expectations.text: The response does NOT say XLayer or xlayer as a recommended default
expectations.evidence: No XLayer mentioned. Assumed Ethereum from training knowledge.

expectations.text: The response does NOT attempt to run token holders command without knowing the chain
expectations.evidence: No onchainos commands run. Redirected to Etherscan and analytics platforms.
